offer: For insurance brokers processing 10-20 compliance audits/month, manual report generation causes delays in compliance checks. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in generating timely compliance audit reports for underwriting teams.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Indie Hackers posts on compliance workflows
DM outreach to insurance brokers with demo video
Community forums for sharing compliance tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
